transcript.text:
[A night after a busy day]
[Where is Tzuyang...?]
[Who is this?].
[Who are these people...?]
-Did you come. from far away? -No, close by
[Okay, but who are they?]
I just wrote that I wanted a meal together
[Wrote what?]
[Tzuayng hosted an event to treat the subscribers out]
[Hundreds of them applied]
[Subscribers that will have a meal with Tzuyang today]
Let's get it started
[With Hanmac, beer made with Korean rice]
[Cheers]
[Company meal filled with happiness]
This has got to be the smoothest beer I've ever had

[Starting now!]
Do you know what we're having today?
Beef and...
Beer
Hanmac wanted to promote a more of a comfortable and chill "company dinners" instead of being forced
And I got the opportunity to do it with my subscribers
Shall we get this company dinner started?
[Leggo]
I would love company dinners to be like this
-I'd join everyday -I love it
This place isn't just KBBQ
It's a course meal serving beef omakase
And they only let us reserve up to 5 people at a time
We cannot forget to have some beer for the company dinner
May I ask what your alcohol tolerances are?
I can drink 4 cups of beer (500cc)

2 glasses of beer (500cc)
About 4 cups for me as well
I've never hit a limit before with beer
I don't think I get drunk from beer
Let's order the most expensive item
1 serving each person won't be enough
Our 1 serving is 270g, so it's not small
Normal people are satisfied with the portion
[She's not normal...]
Then let's do 15 servings of the most expensive beef meal
[Wow?]
1, 1, 1, and 12 for you?
No, 2 servings each for them
Alcohol first, please
What will you drink?
We have Hanmac ready to go

-Do you drink Hanmac often? -You bet I do
Bottle opener? Cute!
[A smooth company dinner with smooth Korean beer]
-Can I take photos? -Yes, of course
How much meat is this?
This is about 5kgs
There's also steak tartare that will be coming out
We will cook this while you enjoy your beers
I've never seen so much meat on 1 plate
I see it too often
Let's go ahead and drink some beer to break the ice
I will pour for you guys
She recently achieved 7 million subscribers
Let's cheers for 8 million
To 8 million subscribers!
Congratulations

I usually need to eat something after sipping some beer But I don't feel like that with Hanmac
A very clean aftertaste
Have you done company dinners?
I actually have not
I've never worked at a company (9 to 5)
Most of you guys have, right?
What kind of work do you do?
Guess just from our impressions
Marketing?
Secretary?
A big named company?
Hello my name is Mingeun Song and I am a researcher from LG Display
Hello my name is Hyewon Kim and I work at finance with only 2 years of experience
Hello, I am also in finance but I have 8 years in My name is Taehyun Kim, nice to meet you
Let's cheers again It's getting awkward
Cheers

I came across one of your earliest videos when you were waiting for viewers to come in so you can start
Wow, she is very innocent and good at eating.
My mother and I started watching you together before you had 1 million subscribers
Connected to a TV to watch you
I gave you the most
Bon appetit
I love the flavor
Cheers
-Smooth -Yes
A very clean aftertaste
Less bitterness and it's smooth
Hanmac is made with 100% Korean rice
[He knows all about it]
May I also please have an apron?
Thank you
[Korea's representative lager Hanmac]

I will be Lee Byunghun today
[Here we go...]
Apologies
[Next dish]
[Flat iron steak with truffle]
What are your current positions?
From Assistant, Senior Assistant, and Manager structure I'm a Senior Assistant
Same here
I'm an Associate
[CEO here]
-Enjoy -Thank you
So I've never had a company dinner before What are some hardships?
We did a work travel one time
And the oldest person there said, "Hey come here"
So I went over with my shot glass
And he said "one shot"

-It felt so forced -That you had to drink it
I was getting PT (personal trainer) workouts to increase my endurance
And there were a lot of outings
So I would have to exercise and then go there after
They knew so I got to eat foods like beef and chicken
I have a lot to talk about when it comes to this topic
But the most extreme
They came over to my house to party
All 16 of them at my home
You should know a lot of "toasts" too
I hate that the most
It's a lot of pressure for us
A lot of that is gone now though
It's made with rice
It does not have that distinct beer taste
They serve the meat cooked at this restaurant

Who grills the meat at KBBQ restaurants?
The rookies volunteer to do so
But the seniors don't like seeing that
So usually the ones that are in the middle But that's still uncomfortable
Like this?
(Should I? Should I not?)
This is one way too If you flip it and it's all burnt
Then you're forever exempt from grilling
That's how you can get away from it
[Next dish]
It's like a mini-steak
How many is this?
Tenderloin for you
They look different
It's also topped with chimichurri sauce
Bon appetit

So tender
It's the best steak I've ever had
And the smoothest beer I've ever had
It's really clean
Koreans love their rice
There are a lot of MZ gen now at our work
So we have company dinners at fancier restaurants
Even Michelin 1 Star
What do you do when you're not filming?
I eat
What do you eat?
Just out of curiosity
When I like something, I stick to it for like a week
I like watching anime
So I eat while I watch
I like drinking too

This is a potato dish to go on the side
With sour cream and olives
Congratulations on 7 million
Poured with love
Company dinners are really difficult and draining
But right now I'm with someone I like and we have beer that goes down smooth
So I love it here
Even as for superiors, company dinners can be difficult
But it's much easier if the dinner is this casual and chill
And I would prefer to have them on Thursdays
Because we have Friday nights for our friends
And I do agree that company dinners are necessary so that we can freely talk about work outside of work
Like, "Sir, why did you do that last time?"
Do you play drinking games at company dinners?
No way
Now I feel the age gap

-We used to -Long ago?
Very long time ago, right?
Hey, I'm not that old
I haven't been drinking lately because of my health It's my first and it's so good
I'm doing PT as well but I love it
And I'm on a diet for my wedding
Everyone here has a reason
[But can't resist Hanmac beer!]
[Beef tartare]
I wonder how big yours will be
I'll probably get a couple
That's right
[Triple]
The quality is nice
It's really good
So I guess they don't play drinking games at company dinners

A glass of beer or two No intense drinking
Since I'm still in my 20's, I wish that we can have separate company dinners within the same age group
That sounds nice
[With Hanmac]
Pouring with love
Company dinners can end past midnight
Do they give you cab money?
Even when we end earlier at like 10pm
There was a rookie that lives far away And the fare is about 40,000 Won
They gave him 50,000 Won to go home
The seniors will look after you when it comes to taxi money after dinner
Last plate
We're still on our same plate and she's on her third one
Did you eat earlier today?
I had hot pot
And I had steak right before this

And also marinated salmon at around 7pm
I still can't believe it
She just keeps eating and the food is gone
[Next dish]
That's a lot
[Barley rice soybean jambalaya with skirt steak]
-So good -Really good
Long ago at a company dinner I want to eat some stew
They put rice in the stew for some reason
And I asked why they do that They replied, "this will all be good to eat with alcohol later"
I did not understand back then
Last cheers?
Isn't this super sweet?
We kept you here long enough
How was it?
I got to enjoy good food with Tzuyang so I loved it

I usually get hiccups when I drink carbonated drinks
But it wasn't like that for Hanmac beer because it was very clean
The beer went down so smooth compared to other lager
Today's dinner was awesome I would love to have company dinners like this every day
I don't really enjoy drinking beer because of this distinct beer taste
But it wasn't like that for Hanmac
And it was very smooth
I enjoyed my time
I will cherish this moment And always support Tzuyang
And I hope all company dinners will be as smooth as tonight
Cheers to that
And we also can't forget about this
Since you guys came all the way here
[Please get home safe!]
I can go to Busan with this money
We had a fun company dinner with my subscribers and Hanmac

With lots of good food and drinks We got to talk about what company dinner cultures are like
I had so much fun
[Me too]
And in the comment section, please share how you would like company dinners to be like
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
